prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-MINPOCKKNV-KC7223-BLk-AMZ-FBA Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Multifunctional EDC Small Pocket Knife, 3 in 1 Tool, Black Description: Featuring a nail file, knife blade, scissors, and key ring, this ASR Outdoor mini pocket knife is ready for adventure; great for camping, to carry as an EDC multi-tool, to include in a bug out bag, with survival gear or an emergency preparedness kit, this little pocket knife does it all.

Compact and lightweight, the multi-tool pocket knife weights under a pound and measures just 2.25 inches when closed. Whether you're fishing, hunting, backpacking, camping, or prepping gear for an outdoor survival or emergency preparedness kit, include this mini ASR Outdoor pocket knife to have alongside you on your next outdoor adventure; each tool looks in place for consistent, efficient, and reliable performance and it will never ask you to sacrifice on weight or space.

With the included keychain ring incorporated into the design, you can attach the pocket knife multi tool to just about anything you need: backpack, wallet, belt loop, camping gear and much more depending on where work or your next outdoor excursion takes you.
Available Colors: Black, Green, Purple, Blue Search Terms: (none) Features: (none) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Small Black Pocket Knife Multi-Tool
